item.title: Peptide Therapies & Health Tech
item.description:
• Summary: Health tech companies, including Noom, are expanding into peptide therapies beyond traditional weight loss drugs, capitalizing on a growing trend. This shift is accompanied by FDA scrutiny on peptide compounding and related regulatory issues.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Endpoints News, STAT News

item.title: OpenEvidence (Prior Authorization Tech)
item.description:
• Summary: OpenEvidence is expanding its technology platform into prior authorization and prescription routing, aiming to streamline administrative processes in healthcare and improve efficiency.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News
